Contracting Authority: Fraunhofer-Gesellschaft zur Förderung der angewandten Forschung, Einkauf und Gerätewirtschaft C2 – Vergabestelle Bau
Project Description:
- External IT consultants for Fraunhofer AISEC (2 lots)
- Lot 1 — DevOps Automation; Lot 2 — Hardening Windows Infrastructure
- Term: 01/06/2024–31/05/2025
- Electronic procedure; award by best value (quality 65%, price 35%)
Important Dates:
- Public opening: 15/04/2024 11:00 (UTC+2)
- Binding period end: 01/06/2024
- Performance period: 01/06/2024–31/05/2025

Scope & Requirements.Scope & Requirements:
Lot 1 — DevOps Automation:
- Deliverables: select/build on‑prem orchestration platform; connect to role management; analyze IT core processes; implement prioritized workflows; German project documentation.
- Key requirements: server infrastructure automation (Linux, Debian preferred); cloud services integration; DevOps consulting/support; IT service automation (app deployment; end‑to‑end user‑workflow automation); strong IT security & compliance; good English, very good German; onsite availability in Garching.
- Tools/technologies (min. basic): VMware ESX, Proxmox, SQL, Terraform, Ansible, Python 3, Bash, Jenkins, REST/API, GitLab, CI/CD, Jira Software/Service Desk, Confluence; desirable: general sysadmin; CI/CD evolution/automation.
- Certifications/training (must provide): IT‑network; programming skills; automation ecosystems (exclusion criterion if not provided).
- Commercial constraints: billing by actual hours; VAT 19% (if different, specify); travel costs to Garching not reimbursed.
- Estimated quantities: Remote 1,344 h; Onsite 576 h.

Lot 2 — Hardening Windows Infrastructure:
- Deliverables: analyze security of current Windows infrastructure; implement MS Security Baselines (Windows Server 2019/2022; Windows 10/11); evaluate/optimize GPOs; prepare/support Tiered Administration/Enterprise Access Model; implement RBAC via Delegation Control; implement WSUS; Windows CA; LAPS; advise on 3rd level changes.
- Key requirements: expert Windows Server infrastructure (Active Directory); public sector experience; ≥10 years Windows‑Server experience; on‑prem migration design (to Office 365/MS Azure); strong GPOs/permissions/WSUS/CA/RDS/IAM/PAM (auth, authZ, MFA, certificates); very strong PowerShell scripting and VMware vSphere/ESX; strong Java, VBA; good Linux/LDAP/PKI; network management (LAN/WAN); very strong Windows‑Server design/admin/troubleshooting; strong IT security & compliance; very good German & English; max. 100 km to AISEC Garching; onsite ~30% / remote ~70%.
- Certifications (mandatory, exclusion): Microsoft Certified Solutions Expert (MCSE, at least Messaging, Cloud Platform Infrastructure); Microsoft Certified Solutions Associate (MCSA, at least Windows Server 2016/2012). Desirable: IT‑network, Windows 10, Active Directory.
- Tools/experience: Windows clients 10/11; Windows Server ≥2016; VMware ESX; PowerShell; Jira; Confluence; Git; desirable: Veeam backup; 3rd‑level support.
- Commercial constraints: billing by actual hours; VAT 19% (if different, specify); travel costs to Garching not reimbursed.
- Estimated quantities: Remote 1,344 h; Onsite 288 h.
Scope & Requirements.Contract Volume:
- Lot 1: 1,344 h remote + 576 h onsite; billing by actual hours; VAT 19%; travel to Garching not reimbursed.
- Lot 2: 1,344 h remote + 288 h onsite; billing by actual hours; VAT 19%; travel to Garching not reimbursed.
Scope & Requirements.Place of Performance:
- Fraunhofer‑Institut AISEC, Lichtenbergstraße 11, 85748 Garching b. München; Germany
- Lot 2: ~30% onsite / ~70% remote; Lot 1: onsite in Garching possible; remote work
Scope & Requirements.Standards & Certifications:
- MCSE (Messaging, Cloud Platform Infrastructure) and MCSA (Windows Server 2016/2012) mandatory for Lot 2 (exclusion)
- Certifications/training to provide for Lot 1: IT‑network, programming, automation ecosystems
- Compliance with MiLoG; Fraunhofer NHS (Sustainability Standards) contractual
Scope & Requirements.Subcontracting & Consortia:
- Subcontractors must be clearly named; indicate share; mandatory qualifications (e.g., MCSE/MCSA) must be evidenced for subs
- Joint tenders allowed: declaration naming all members; authorized representative; joint and several liability
- Subcontracting/third parties require prior written approval (per contract template)
Scope & Requirements.Forms & e-Submission:
- Electronic submission only via https://vergabe.fraunhofer.de using AI Bieter‑Cockpit (AI Weblauncher required)
- Language: German; no variants; e‑invoicing required
- Use provided forms; submit in text form by deadline

Offer Submission Documents: Signed self‑declaration: no exclusion grounds (§§123/124 GWB)
Filled Leistungsverzeichnis / price sheet per lot
Proof of MCSE/MCSA (Lot 2; incl. subs if used)
List of subcontractors and their performance share (if any)
List of Documents: Company profile F 1.1.1 (founding year, milestones, headcount, services)
Any self‑cleaning measures per §125 GWB (if applicable)

Economic & Financial Standing.Turnover in Comparable Services: Provide turnover for the last 3 financial years (F 1.1.2); buyer may obtain Creditreform/Coface check if >500,000 €

Legal & Registration.Self-declarations (GWB §§123/124 or equi: Mandatory signed self‑declaration (no exclusion grounds); signed EU 833/2014 Russia‑link declaration incl. >10% subcontractors/suppliers
Legal & Registration.Subcontractor Identification & Reliance: Name subs; indicate share; provide their qualifications; consortia declaration with authorized representative; joint liability

Technical & Professional Ability.Personnel Profiles:
- Lot 1: DevOps automation expert (Linux/Debian), cloud integration, DevOps consulting, IT‑service automation; security & compliance; tools: VMware ESX, Proxmox, SQL, Terraform, Ansible, Python 3, Bash, Jenkins, REST/API, GitLab, CI/CD, Jira, Confluence; DE very good, EN good.
- Lot 2: Windows infrastructure hardening expert (AD), public sector experience, ≥10 years Windows‑Server; GPOs/WSUS/CA/RDS/IAM/PAM; very strong PowerShell & VMware; Java, VBA; DE & EN very good; max. 100 km to Garching.
Technical & Professional Ability.Headcount / Staffing:
- Offer 1 concrete consultant profile per lot; full‑time
- Lot 2 delivery: ~30% onsite / ~70% remote
- Ability to provide replacement staff is evaluated (<2 days, 3–5 days, >5 days)

Company Referrals: - Company/bidder references to be provided when requested; buyer may ask for reference certificates for comparable services
Award Criteria:
- Overall (both lots): Quality (Qualification) 65%; Price 35%.

Lot 1 — DevOps Automation (weights):
- Price: 35%
- Replacement staff availability: 10% (<2 days = 100 pts; 3–5 days = 50; >5 days = 0)
- DevOps professional experience: 30% (10 pts per year; max 100)
- Experience sub‑criteria total 10% (each 20% of this category):
  • Service infrastructure automation (<5y 25; 5–7y 50; 8–10y 75; >10y 100)
  • Cloud services integration (<3y 25; 3–6y 50; 7–10y 75; >10y 100)
  • DevOps consulting/support (<3y 25; 3–6y 50; 7–10y 75; >10y 100)
  • App deployment automation (<3y 25; 3–6y 50; 7–10y 75; >10y 100)
  • End‑to‑end user‑workflow automation (<3y 25; 3–6y 50; 7–10y 75; >10y 100)
- Knowledge sub‑criteria total 10% (each 25% of this category):
  • Linux/(Open)LDAP/PKI; • IT‑Security & Compliance; • General sysadmin; • CI/CD evolution (each: <3y 25; 3–6y 50; 7–10y 75; >10y 100)
- Concept: Compliance implementation & onsite monitoring: 5% (0–100 pts scale)
- Certifications/training (IT‑network, programming, automation ecosystems): 0% weight but exclusion if missing.

Lot 2 — Hardening Windows Infrastructure (weights):
- Price: 35%
- Replacement staff availability: 10% (<2 days = 100 pts; 3–5 days = 50; >5 days = 0)
- Start date: 10% (01.01.2024 = 100; 01.02.2024 = 50; later = 0)
- Professional experience total 20% (each 25% of this category):
  • Windows‑Server infrastructure (<5y 25; 5–7y 50; 8–10y 75; >10y 100)
  • Public sector experience (<3y 25; 3–6y 50; 7–10y 75; >10y 100)
  • Windows‑Server experience (<5y 0; 6–10y 50; >10y 100)
  • Migration planning/design/execution (<3y 25; 3–6y 50; 7–10y 75; >10y 100)
- Knowledge total 20% (each 25% of this category):
  • On‑prem infrastructure design (0/25/75/100 per self‑assessment)
  • Desirable knowledge: Veeam backup; IT service (3rd‑level) (50 pts per area)
  • AD/Windows Server admin/operations (<3y 25; 3–6y 50; 7–10y 75; >10y 100)
  • Exchange Server admin/operations (<3y 25; 3–6y 50; 7–10y 75; >10y 100)
- Concept: Compliance implementation & onsite monitoring: 5% (0–100 pts scale)
- Qualifications: 0% weight but exclusion if missing (MCSE, MCSA).
